description_en: Advanced CLIA system with iconic consumable management.
fullDescription_en: AutoLumo A1860 is designed for laboratories needing reliable and fast immunoassay testing. It features automatic dual-substrate switching and auto-retesting to ensure accurate results without manual intervention.

features_en.title: Automatic Substrate Switch
features_en.description: Ensures continuous operation by automatically switching between dual substrates.

features_en.title: Auto-retesting
features_en.description: Intelligence built-in to trigger retests based on predefined clinical criteria.

features_en.title: Consumable Management
features_en.description: Iconic management system for RVs and other consumables to prevent downtime.
